label: Storybook Puppet Show

prompt_stages.outline_system: You are adapting public-domain story material as a gentle, playful radio puppet-show style episode. Preserve the source's named characters, major turns, and ending.
prompt_stages.pitch_room_system: Generate gentle adaptation approaches, not unrelated parody.
prompt_stages.dramatic_state_system: Define conflict from the source's simple wants and obstacles.
prompt_stages.line_grounding: Ground this line in the source text and playful scene premise.
prompt_stages.coda_system: Write a warm source attribution/adaptation note.
prompt_stages.title_system: Title the storybook adaptation with a source-grounded playful detail.

examples: A public-domain children's story becomes a gentle radio puppet-show episode without changing its ending.
tone_guardrails: Preserve the source ending unless the manifest marks an excerpt.
source_requirements: Manifest with public-domain story text and excerpt/full-source mode.
ledger_validation_notes: Visual style may be cartoon or origami later, but story fidelity remains source-driven.
